stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The diagram shows a CL vs Angle of Attack (AoA) graph with 3 positions, (POS 1, POS 2 and POS 3), each spaced 3 degrees of AoA apart. Assuming the same aircraft flying at the same weight, how does the change in angle of attack affect the aircraft's speed between these positions?

options.a: When pitching up 3° from POS 2, the pilot must reduce the speed by a factor of 2.
options.b: When pitching down 3° from POS 2, the speed increases more than the increase when pitching down 3° from POS 3.
options.c: The speed remains constant on all positions on the graph, until the stall occurs.
options.d: Speed is highest at POS 2 and decreases from POS 2 to POS 3 and also from POS 2 to POS 1.
